example: Please **take turns to** speak in class.
Students, please **work in pairs** to finish the task.
Let's **ask and answer questions** about the story.
You need to **practice in pairs** for 5 minutes.
Now **role play with your partner** the conversation.

phrase: Read the dialogue with your partner
example: Please **read the dialogue with your partner** aloud.
Groups will **act out the dialogue** in front of the class.
Use these words to **make a new dialogue**.
Come to the front and **present your dialogue**.
Please **show your dialogue** to the class.
**Welcome to Grade 7**! I'm glad to see you all.
**This is our first lesson** of the new term.
Hello everyone, **I'm your new teacher** Mr. Smith.
**I'm very happy to** meet all of you today.
**I want to know you** better this term.
**Let's introduce ourselves** one by one.
We'll **start with you**, Tom.
Please stand up and **tell us your name**.
Can you tell me **how old are you**?
I want to know **what do you like** to do.
Please tell the class **where are you from**.
**I live near** the school library.
**I like reading** books about science.
**I enjoy playing** basketball with friends.
**My favourite subject is** English.
**I am good at** drawing and painting.
**I want to be** a doctor in the future.
**When I grow up**, I will help sick people.
**Nice to meet you all**! Let's learn together.
Come and say hi. **Let's be friends**!
**Now let's start** our English lesson.
Please **open your books** to page 10.
**Turn to page** 25, please.
**Look at the pictures** and describe them.
Please **read the text** silently first.
After reading, **answer the questions** below.
We need to **work together** to solve this.
In our class, we **help each other**.
Students can **learn from each other**.
Let's **make progress together** this year!
**Today we will learn** about animals.

phrase: The topic of this lesson is
example: **The topic of this lesson is** daily routines.
**We will talk about** your hobbies.
**We will learn how to** write emails.
**Pay attention please**, this is important.
Please **listen carefully** to the instructions.
While I speak, **take notes please**.
Do you understand? **Any questions**?
Good work everyone. **Let's have a break**.
Break is over. **Let's continue** our lesson.
